message:
fix(workflows,events): prevent infinite JumpTo loop and track backpressure drops

Two logic correctness fixes:

1. workflows/runner.rs: StepResult::JumpTo had no protection against
   infinite backward jumps. A malicious or buggy workflow could
   JumpTo step 0 indefinitely, causing CPU starvation and state
   corruption. Added jump_count tracker with max_total_jumps limit
   (step_count * 10, minimum 100). Exceeding the limit aborts the
   workflow with a clear error message.

2. events.rs: When broadcast::send() fails due to subscriber lag
   (all receivers full), the event was silently dropped and counted
   as "no subscribers" in metrics. Now checks receiver_count() to
   distinguish true no-subscriber drops from backpressure drops,
   incrementing subscriber_lag_events for the latter. This enables
   operators to detect and respond to slow consumers.

Validated: frankenterm-core lib compiles clean (no-default-features).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
